revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia categories
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Kk]] to [[Category:&action=edit]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:&action=edit]] to [[Category:Uncategorized original categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Uncategorized original categories]] to [[Category:year categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Attempting to force efresh]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:12th-century Buddhists|Monks]] [[Category:12th-century monks|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist monks by century]] [[Category:year categories]] }}</noinclude>
[[Category:Categories with 2 members]]
[[en:Category:12th-century Buddhist monks]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:12th-century Buddhists|Monks]] [[Category:12th-century monks|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist monks by century]] [[Category:year categories]] }}</noinclude>
[[Category:Categories with 2 members]]
[[en:Category:12th-century Buddhist monks]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:12世紀の僧]] [[ar:Category:رهبان بوذيون في القرن 12]] [[commons:Category:12th-century Buddhist monks]] [[es:Category:Monjes budistas del siglo XII]] [[fr:Category:Moine bouddhique du XIIe siècle]] [[ur:Category:بارہویں صدی کے بھکشو]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:12th-century Buddhists|Monks]] [[Category:12th-century monks|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist monks by century]] [[Category:year categories]] }}</noinclude> [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:12th-century Buddhist monks]] [[en:Category:12th-century Buddhist monks]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:12世紀の僧]] [[ar:Category:رهبان بوذيون في القرن 12]] [[commons:Category:12th-century Buddhist monks]] [[es:Category:Monjes budistas del siglo XII]] [[fr:Category:Moine bouddhique du XIIe siècle]] [[ur:Category:بارہویں صدی کے بھکشو]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀の僧}} 12世紀の仏教の僧に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:そう}}
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]]
==Old Content== {{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> [[ar:Category:رهبان بوذيون في القرن 12]] [[Category:12th-century Buddhists|Monks]] [[Category:12th-century monks|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist monks by century]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Year categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q70813298)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=12th-century_Buddhist_monks here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
